properties.description: Mapping Data Flow for SSIS Data Flow Task: Data Flow Task

sources.name: Data_Source
sources.description: Source from SSIS OleDbSource: Data Source

typeProperties.query:
--GL

/****** Script for Transaction GL  ******/

-- [GLAccountCR1]
SELECT 
      [Agency]
      ,[SubAgency]
	  ,[Biennium]
      --[PostingFiscalMonth]
	  ,CASE
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '25' THEN '24' 
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '99' THEN '12' 
		ELSE [PostingFiscalMonth]
	   END AS [Posting Fiscal Month]
	  --[Posting Adjust Month]
	,CASE
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '25' THEN '25' 
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '99' THEN '99' 
		ELSE 0
	  END AS [Posting Adjust Month]
	  ,[AfrsDailyTransAddsId] AS [ADDS Transaction Key] 
	  ,[GLAccountCR1] AS [GL Account]
	  ,'CR' AS [Dr Cr Ind]
	  ,IIF([SubsidiaryAccountA] <> '', [SubsidiaryAccountA], IIF([SubsidiaryAccountB] <> '', [SubsidiaryAccountB], '')) AS [Subsidiary Account]
	  ,IIF([ReverseInd] = 'R', [TransactionAmount],  -[TransactionAmount]) AS [GL Amount]

 FROM [DAILYTRANS].[dbo].[AFRS_DailyTrans_ADDS]
 WHERE [Agency] = 235									--LNI ONLY
	AND [PostingFiscalMonth] <> 00						--Fiscal Posting Month not equal 00
	--AND [ProcessDate] >= DateAdd(hh, -24, GETDATE())	--Transactions Processed in the last 24 hours
	AND [ProcessDate] >= '3-23-2026'
	AND [GLAccountCR1] <> ''

UNION ALL

-- [GLAccountDR1]
SELECT 
      [Agency]
      ,[SubAgency]
	  ,[Biennium]
      --[PostingFiscalMonth]
	  ,CASE
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '25' THEN '24' 
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '99' THEN '12' 
		ELSE [PostingFiscalMonth]
	   END AS [Posting Fiscal Month]
	  --[Posting Adjust Month]
	,CASE
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '25' THEN '25' 
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '99' THEN '99' 
		ELSE 0
	  END AS [Posting Adjust Month]
	  ,[AfrsDailyTransAddsId] AS [ADDS Transaction Key] 
	  ,[GLAccountDR1] AS [GL Account]
	  ,'DR' AS [Dr Cr Ind]
	  ,IIF([SubsidiaryAccountA] <> '', [SubsidiaryAccountA], IIF([SubsidiaryAccountB] <> '', [SubsidiaryAccountB], '')) AS [Subsidiary Account]
	  ,IIF([ReverseInd] = 'R', -[TransactionAmount],  [TransactionAmount]) AS [GL Amount]

 FROM [DAILYTRANS].[dbo].[AFRS_DailyTrans_ADDS]
 WHERE [Agency] = 235									--LNI ONLY
	AND [PostingFiscalMonth] <> 00						--Fiscal Posting Month not equal 00
	--AND [ProcessDate] >= DateAdd(hh, -24, GETDATE())	--Transactions Processed in the last 24 hours
	AND [ProcessDate] >= '3-23-2026'
	AND [GLAccountCR1] <> ''

UNION ALL

	,CASE
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '25' THEN '25' 
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '99' THEN '99' 
		ELSE 0
	  END AS [Posting Adjust Month]
	  ,[AfrsDailyTransAddsId] AS [ADDS Transaction Key] 
	  ,[GLAccountCR2] AS [GL Account]
	  ,'CR' AS [Dr Cr Ind]
	  ,IIF([SubsidiaryAccountA] <> '', [SubsidiaryAccountA], IIF([SubsidiaryAccountB] <> '', [SubsidiaryAccountB], '')) AS [Subsidiary Account]
	  ,IIF([ReverseInd] = 'R', [TransactionAmount],  -[TransactionAmount]) AS [GL Amount]

 FROM [DAILYTRANS].[dbo].[AFRS_DailyTrans_ADDS]
 WHERE [Agency] = 235									--LNI ONLY
	AND [PostingFiscalMonth] <> 00						--Fiscal Posting Month not equal 00

	AND [GLAccountCR1] <> ''

UNION ALL

 WHERE [Agency] = 235									--LNI ONLY

	--AND [ProcessDate] >= DateAdd(hh, -24, GETDATE())	--Transactions Processed in the last 24 hours

	  ,[AfrsDailyTransAddsId] AS [ADDS Transaction Key]

      ,[SubAgency]
	  ,[Biennium]

	   END AS [Posting Fiscal Month]
	  --[Posting Adjust Month]
	,CASE
		WHEN [PostingFiscalMonth] = '25' THEN '25'

	  ,[AfrsDailyTransAddsId] AS [ADDS Transaction Key]

---- [GLAccountDR4]
SELECT

      ,[SubAgency]

sinks.name: CSV_Output
sinks.description: Sink from SSIS FlatFileDestination: CSV Output

typeProperties.script:
source(output(
        Biennium as string,
        Agency as string,
        SubAgency as string,
        Posting Fiscal Month as string,
        Posting Adjust Month as integer,
        ADDS Transaction Key as integer,
        GL Account as string,
        Dr Cr Ind as string,
        Subsidiary Account as string,
        GL Amount as decimal
    ),
    allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    isolationLevel: 'READ_UNCOMMITTED',
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError') ~> Data_Source
Data_Source derive(/* TODO: add expressions */) ~> Derived_Column
Derived_Column select(mapColumn(
        Biennium, Agency, SubAgency, Posting Fiscal Month, Posting Adjust Month, ADDS Transaction Key, GL Account, Dr Cr Ind, Subsidiary Account, GL Amount
    )) ~> CSV_Output_mapped
CSV_Output_mapped sink(allowSchemaDrift: true,
    validateSchema: false,
    errorHandlingOption: 'stopOnFirstError',
    deletable: false,
    insertable: true,
    updateable: false,
    upsertable: false) ~> CSV_Output
scriptLines: Data_Source derive(/* TODO: add expressions */) ~> Derived_Column
Biennium, Agency, SubAgency, Posting Fiscal Month, Posting Adjust Month, ADDS Transaction Key, GL Account, Dr Cr Ind, Subsidiary Account, GL Amount
